sections.paragraph:
m.-

(1) the end, the latter part of anything (Arab. عُقْبُ); also as an adv. unto the end, continually, Psa 119:33, 112 Psa 119:112.

(2) wages, reward, as if the end, the result of labour; compare λοισθήϊα, reward, from λοῖσθος, last. Psa 19:12 Pro 22:4. And so עַל־עֵקֶב Psal. 40:16 70:4 and עֵקֶב Isa 5:23, in reward of, i.e. on account of; and as a conj. because that, because, Num 14:24 Deu 7:12 fully עֵקֶב אֲשֶׁר Gen 26:5, and עֵקֶב כִּי Amo 4:12.
